title: While and Do-While Loop in C++
summary: Loops are fundamental constructs in programming that allow us to repeat a block of code multiple times. In C++, two commonly used loop structures are the while loop and the do-while loop. In this blog post, we’ll dive into these loops, understand their syntax, and provide examples to illustrate their usage.
